softWarnings: [library-bound-css] research-center-overview.html: Library-bound mode discourages custom CSS class definitions in <style> blocks (.no-scrollbar, .quick-chip, .section-kicker, .stage-rail, .stage-card, .stage-card__index, .stage-card__label, .stage-card__meta). Prefer Tailwind utilities plus Library brand CSS variables/component JSON instead.
